docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $690.05 FILED BY AMERICAN DENERAL FINANCE AS TO DEFENDANT ANTIPA ALEXANDER T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANTIPA ALEXANDER T.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN DENERAL FINANCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTIPA ALEXANDER T. $690.05 PRINCIPAL, $66.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $756.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO ALEXANDER ANTIPA RETURNED, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
